name: Spider family | Demon Slayer
description:
The Spider Family was a group of five demons: Father, Mother, Daughter, Son, and Rui, who portrayed himself as the youngest brother of the family but was actually the true leader and most powerful of the group. However, the clan at one point had nine total members, previously having two additional sisters and brothers. They were most likely killed by Rui for failing to meet his expectations in their roles as his family members, leaving only the last four present and himself.

The Spider Family was an oddity, as demons typically don't form groups. Although calling themselves a "family," the clan was highly dysfunctional at best and downright violent and sadistic at worst within their own kin, with torturous levels of physical and psychological abuse being commonly practiced. There was no sign of real love or trust between its members and as Tanjiro Kamado put it, it was a fake bond that reeked of mistrust, fear, and disgust. One previous member told Daughter that each one of them came to Rui because they were afraid of the Demon Slayers and only played in his macabre game to survive.

Rui, however, took to great lengths to try to protect his family, even if most of them lived completely terrified of him. Nonetheless, due to being given Muzan's blood through him, each of the clan's members was all quite powerful demons; they were the strongest demons Tanjiro, Zenitsu and Inosuke had faced thus far in their lives and the clan was responsible for a great loss of life in the Demon Slayer Corps.

___
